author: y4rr
content: Plan: IO round-trip conformance (#871). PNG is lossless (exact byte match already tested). JPEG is lossy — need tolerance test: write tensor as JPEG, read back, verify values within quantization tolerance (~10/255 for JPEG quality 75-95). Also add raw tensor binary round-trip (write f32 values to file, read back, verify exact). Existing conformance_vision_io.rs already covers PNG round-trip; extend it with JPEG tolerance test.
